name: Targeting weight loss and blood glucose control with oral sodium butyrate in overweight/obese adults with and without type 2 diabetes: A proof-of-concept randomized controlled trial.
summary: A 46-participant double-blind randomized trial of 1875 mg/day oral sodium butyrate for 12 weeks in overweight or obese adults with or without type 2 diabetes, reporting serum butyrate increases and metabolic signals.
